placeholder.memoInput: Enter a memo as needed (e.g., company name, planned application date)

helper.dateWeb: Click the calendar icon to select a date
helper.dateNative: Tap the calendar icon to select a date
helper.typeAutoSet: Required documents are automatically set based on the visa type
helper.memoEncrypted: Avoid entering personal information (name, residence card number, etc.). Memos are stored encrypted.

info.applicationPeriodBody:
Residence status renewal applications can be submitted approximately 4 months before the expiration date.
We recommend starting preparations early.

accessibility.residenceTypeHint: Tap to select a visa type
